boundary: Manual Group G artifact intake only; does not authorize RTX speedup claims.

results.activation_gate: Promote only after a Goal879 RTX artifact separates prepare/query/postprocess and is reviewed against same-semantics threshold baselines.

baseline_review_contract.forbidden_comparison: Do not compare a scalar/prepared RTX sub-path against a whole-app, row-output, validation-included, or different-result-mode baseline.

results.claim_scope: prepared OptiX fixed-radius threshold traversal for Hausdorff <= radius decisions
results.non_claim: not an exact Hausdorff distance, KNN-row, or nearest-neighbor ranking speedup claim
results.optix_performance_note: Default exact-distance mode uses KNN rows through CUDA-style kernels; explicit directed_threshold_prepared mode uses prepared OptiX fixed-radius threshold traversal for Hausdorff <= radius decisions only.
results.reason_deferred: Goal879 exposes a prepared OptiX threshold-decision sub-path, but a phase profiler and same-semantics RTX artifact are still required.
